name: Hot Sauce B1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Bean sauce (found in Chinese groceries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and mix well.
2. Note: To make hot oil, place a handful of dried red peppers in a bowl. Pour hot oil over and let sit. This will keep for several weeks. When needed, use the oil but not the peppers.
3. Garlic, ginger, and dry sherry are considered essential to Chinese cuisine, similar to how salt and pepper are used by Americans. Add them as desired.
